title: A7MD's 3D Books
description:
Changes the boring Minecraft 2d Books
into a styled 3D Books
body:
# **📙 3D Books Resource Pack 📗**

Bring your Minecraft Books to life with fully detailed 3D models! This resource pack enhances all in-game books by giving them unique, three-dimensional designs, making them more immersive and visually stunning.


---
## _**✨ Features:**_
✔️ Custom 3D Books – Each Book type has a distinct, high-quality 3D model.

✔️ Enhanced Book Shapes & Paper.

✔️ Works with All Book Types – Enchanted, Writen, and Regular Books are full redesigned.

✔️ Seamless Compatibility – Works with vanilla Minecraft or other resource packs!



---
## _**🎮 How to Install:**_

Download the pack (.zip file).

Move it to your resourcepacks folder.

Enable it in Minecraft Settings > Resource Packs.

---
## **Enjoy beautifully designed 3D potions!**
## Transform your alchemy with stunning 3D potion bottles—perfect for 

- **Survival**
- **Modapcks**
- **Servers**


Enjoy your new Books!
---
